name: Agnes Tachyon - Newlyweds
description:
"You're my Number #1, and no guinea pigs could even cross my mind when I'm with YOU."

THANK YOU FOR 100 FOLLOWERS!!

Didn't think I'd actually get 100 followers on this site. Love y'all fr fr.

Uma wife once again, but this time no child since I wanna save tokens.

Anyways, you and Agnes Tachyon, three months into marriage, as per usual I didn't specify on how you two met, so it's all up to you. (Pls share with me on how y'all met I wanna feel emotional here.)

Here's a pic of her during your marriage day (I'm the photographer):

Sorry if this was posted late, I've been through some stuff this past week and it really demotivated me from making bots. I would like to apologize to the people that waited to long.
